title: TestCase entity (ONT-E-20, D-02)
description: A test plan: qualification / verification / validation / acceptance / development. Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref + unevaluatedProperties: false (Pitfall #1 lock; NEVER additionalProperties: false). Distinct from TestReport (which captures execution outcome); the two are linked via TestReport.test_case_ref foreign key (NOT a relation per RESEARCH.md Open Question #2 and ADR-002). Per ADR-002, DO-178C / DO-254 specific criticality fields (test category, criticality level, evidence type) are deferred to v0.2.0+. Examples: 'DO-160G Section 21 power-input qualification for FCC unit', 'CFD validation case for NACA 0012 at Re=6e6'. Schema version: 0.1.0.

test_objective.description: What the test is designed to demonstrate. ≥20 characters to discourage placeholder content. Example: 'Demonstrate that the FCC unit operates within specification across the full DO-160G Section 21 power-input envelope including dropout and surge conditions.'

target.description: URI to the entity being tested — typically a Component, AircraftSystem, or Subsystem. Phase 3 validator confirms the URI resolves to an existing entity of an allowed type.

test_type.description: Test purpose. qualification = formal compliance to a standard/regulation (e.g. DO-160). verification = does the implementation match the requirement. validation = does the requirement match the user need. acceptance = customer sign-off test. development = engineering exploration during design.

environmental_conditions.description: Free-text environmental envelope in v0.1.0. Examples: 'Operating temperature -55°C to +70°C, humidity 0-95% RH non-condensing, altitude up to 55,000 ft', 'Sea-level standard atmosphere'. v0.2.0+ may introduce a DO-160-shaped structured object.

acceptance_criteria.description: Pass/fail criteria for the test. ≥20 characters. Example: 'No loss of function during voltage transients per DO-160G Section 21 Category B; recovery within 100 ms; no permanent damage observed in post-test inspection.'

prerequisites.description: Conditions or prior tests that must hold before this test runs. Examples: ['BIT pass', 'temperature soak ≥ 1 hour at -55°C', 'TestCase TC-PWR-001 completed with PASS outcome'].
